auth.signInSubtitle: Use your email and password to access this instance.
auth.signUpSubtitle: Create an account for this instance. Email confirmation is not required in v1.
auth.fillAllFields: Please fill in all required fields.

cliAuth.approvedDescription: The Paperclip CLI can now finish authentication on the requesting machine.
cliAuth.restartFlowMessage: Start the CLI auth flow again from your terminal to generate a new approval request.
cliAuth.signInRequiredDescription: Sign in or create an account, then return to this page to approve the CLI access request.
cliAuth.approveDescription: A local Paperclip CLI process is requesting board access to this instance.
cliAuth.updateFailed: Failed to update CLI auth challenge
cliAuth.requiresAdminAccess: This challenge requires instance-admin access. Sign in with an instance admin account to approve it.

inviteLanding.notAvailableDescription: This invite may be expired, revoked, or already used.
inviteLanding.bootstrapCompleteDescription: The first instance admin is now configured. You can continue to the board.
inviteLanding.joinSubmittedDescription: Your request is pending admin approval. You will not have access until approved.
inviteLanding.signInBeforeHumanJoin: Sign in or create an account before submitting a human join request.
inviteLanding.alreadyMember: You are already a member of this company.
inviteLanding.joinRejected: Your request to join this company was rejected.
inviteLanding.inviteUsed: This invite has already been used or is no longer available.
inviteLanding.accountAlreadyExistsInfo: An account already exists for {{email}}. Sign in below to continue with this invite.
inviteLanding.emailPasswordMismatch: That email and password did not match an existing Paperclip account. Check both fields, or create an account first if you are new here.
inviteLanding.accountMayAlreadyExistInfo: An account may already exist for {{email}}. Try signing in instead.
inviteLanding.invitedToJoinPaperclip: You've been invited to join Paperclip
inviteLanding.agentIntro: Review the invite details, then submit the agent information below to start the join request.
inviteLanding.humanAccountIntro: Create your Paperclip account first. If you already have one, switch to sign in and continue the invite with the same email.
inviteLanding.readyIntro: Your account is ready. Review the invite details, then accept it to continue.
inviteLanding.submitAgentDetailsDescription: This invite will create an approval request for a new agent in {{company}}.
inviteLanding.createAccountIntro: Start with a Paperclip account. After that, you'll come right back here to accept the invite for {{company}}.
inviteLanding.signInIntro: Use the Paperclip account that already matches this invite. If you do not have one yet, switch back to create account.
inviteLanding.fillAllFields: Please fill in all required fields.
inviteLanding.alreadySignedUpHint: Already signed up before? Use the existing-account option instead so the invite lands on the right Paperclip user.
inviteLanding.noAccountYetHint: No account yet? Switch back to create account so you can accept the invite with a new login.
inviteLanding.willFinishBootstrap: This will finish setting up Paperclip.
inviteLanding.willSubmitJoin: This will submit or complete your join request for {{company}}.
inviteLanding.awaitingApprovalText: Your request is still awaiting approval. {{approver}} must approve your request to join.
inviteLanding.refreshAfterApproval: Refresh this page after you've been approved — you'll be redirected automatically.

boardClaim.claimedDescription: This instance is now linked to your authenticated user.
boardClaim.signInRequiredDescription: Sign in or create an account, then return to this page to claim Board ownership.
boardClaim.claimDescription: This will promote your user to instance admin and migrate company ownership access from local trusted mode.
